title: May 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 29''' is the 149th day of the year (150th in leap years). There are 216 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1900s#1905|1905]] – [[Sebastian Shaw]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Al Rodrigo]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Abel G. Peña]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 118]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Erica Lindbeck]] is born.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 22]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Harvey Korman]] dies.
*2008 – [[Dark Times 11|''Dark Times'' 11]] published.
*2008 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 29|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 29]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Gunship Over Florrum]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1|''Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1'']] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.6|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.6]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 108|''Star Wars'' (1977) 108]] published
*2019 – [[Vader - Dark Visions 4|''Vader - Dark Visions'' 4]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Practical]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – [[Celebration Anaheim (2022)|Celebration Anaheim]] ends.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[Jango Fett 3|''Jango Fett'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 6|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 6]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire 2|''The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire'' 2]] published.
